fn choose() := match x { left => produce a, right => produce b }
---
Fn(name="choose", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("x"), arms=[left => Produce(Variable("a")), right => Produce(Variable("b"))]))
==========
fn pick() := match a { x => produce x }
---
Fn(name="pick", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[x => Produce(Variable("x"))]))
==========
fn pick2() := match a { .some(let x) => produce x, .none => produce a }
---
Fn(name="pick2", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[. some ( let x ) => Produce(Variable("x")), . none => Produce(Variable("a"))]))
